title: Omni chunk
description: Changes to one chunk affect ALL chunks.
body:
Changes to one chunk affect ALL chunks.




This mod was originally from Quillbee This is a port From 1.16 to 1.21/26.1


[The Original Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=usiGkV_wXLI&t)


Also you can Toggle The Mod by **/omnichunk toggle**



[My CurseForge Page](https://curseforge.com/members/saodcf/projects)



![Placing and Breaking blocks affect every Chunk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3ec5959660f6681ee45575044dfbc08cb849365.gif)



Also Indestructible Blocks aren't affected by this mod e.g "Bedrock" "Air" "Barrier"


**Warning**: This mod **WILL** permanently destroy your world be absolutely sure to make a backup before loading it.
